primaryItems.label: Device calibration certificate
primaryItems.draftChaseWording: Please provide Device calibration certificate (see MG6C/MOT/02) or confirm in writing why it is not available.
primaryItems.whyItMatters: Device calibration and full intoxilyser record needed.

primaryItems.label: Full intoxilyser record
primaryItems.draftChaseWording: Please provide Full intoxilyser record (see MG6C/MOT/04) or confirm in writing why it is not available.
primaryItems.whyItMatters: Device calibration and full intoxilyser record needed.

primaryItems.label: CCTV / dashcam export
primaryItems.draftChaseWording: Please provide CCTV / dashcam export (see MG6C/MOT/05) or confirm in writing why it is not available.
primaryItems.whyItMatters: CCTV or dashcam export referred on schedule — not attached.

safeCourtLine: The defence asks the court to record per MG6C that procedure summary is served but device calibration, full intoxilyser record, and CCTV/dashcam export remain outstanding.
